name: Peanut Butter Pie/TVFN
recipeInstructions:
Crust: Mix together graham cracker crumbs, sugar and melted butter. Press into 9 inch pie plate or 9 inch springform pan. Freeze for 1 hour.
Filling: Using an electric mixer, beat heavy cream on high speed until stiff peaks form. Set aside.
Beat together cream cheese, peanut butter, sugar and vanilla in a large bowl (use the same beaters). Beat until light and fluffy. Fold half of the whipped cream into the peanut butter mixture until combined. Add remaining half of cream. Fold until well blended. Spoon filling over frozen crust. Spread evenly. Cover lightly with foil and refrigerate for 4-6 hours.
Topping: In a small saucepan, melt together chocolate chips, butter and coffee. Stir over low heat until smooth. Cool about 15 minutes. Spread topping over the top of the pie leaving a 1 inch rim around the edges without topping. Chill for 1 hour.
